name: The Attack of the Dead
description:
On August 6th, 1915. During a battle at Osowiec Fortress, the Germans used Chlorine Gas, and the Russians used white clothes to survive, and fought back. But among the corpses of the actual dead Russians and Germans, they are brought back to life as Zombies, and started attacking the Russians and Germans, leading both sides making a truce. As they fought in Poland, The Blight began to spread rapidly across Europe during the First World War.

Inspiration: The Battle of Osowiec (August 6th, 1915), The Attack of the Dead Men by Sabaton, Guts and Blackpowder.
creator: SamuraiGaming
